## Classification

- [ ] Public-facing policy
- [ ] Internal-only policy
- [ ] Unsure / needs classification review

## Business Need

Describe why this policy is needed.

## Draft or Source Material

Attach or link any draft language, source documents, board records, legal guidance, regulatory requirements, or related materials.

## Required Reviewers

Check all that apply:

- [ ] Governance review
- [ ] Compliance review
- [ ] Legal review
- [ ] Privacy/Security review
- [ ] Operations review
- [ ] HR review
- [ ] Finance review
- [ ] Board approval or board record
- [ ] Other

## Publication Notes

Describe where the policy should appear in the library and whether the Policy Index or navigation should be updated.

## Sensitive Information Check

- [ ] I have reviewed this request for sensitive internal information.
- [ ] I understand internal-only materials should not be published to the public policy library.
